scripts.install:all: npm install && cd frontend && npm install && cd ../mcp-servers/library && npm install && cd ../cafeteria && npm install && cd ../events && npm install && cd ../academics && npm install
scripts.dev: concurrently "cd frontend && npm run dev" "cd mcp-servers/library && npm start" "cd mcp-servers/cafeteria && npm start" "cd mcp-servers/events && npm start" "cd mcp-servers/academics && npm start"
